# AI Usage Log

## Tool Used

* ChatGPT

## Purpose of Usage

The AI tool was used for:

* Python coding assistance
* Debugging code
* Repository structure recommendations
* Documentation formatting
* Visualization suggestions

## Not Generated by AI

The following components were created and reviewed by students:

* Research Questions
* Statistical Interpretations
* Null and Alternative Hypotheses (H0 and H1)
* Conclusions
* Final Discussion

## Disclosure

All AI-assisted content has been reviewed, modified, and validated by the project team before submission.
